tools.name: get_user_story_content
tools.description: Get tp card (user story) content by specified id, e.g. 145789

tools.name: get_release_user_stories_with_description
tools.description:
Get release user stories with description in the response.
      Note: this is slower than "get_release_user_stories_names" tool,
      but if user wants to get descriptions, then this tool is the way to go.

tools.name: get_release_open_bugs
tools.description: Get release active bugs (bugs that are not closed, done, passed, ready to deploy)

tools.name: get_release_open_user_stories
tools.description: Get release active user stories (user stories that are not closed, done, passed, ready to deploy)

tools.name: search_all_cards_by_keyword
tools.description: Searches tp cards (user stories, bugs, features) by keyword or partial name or partial keyphrase e.g. "Text Element"

tools.name: get_bug_content
tools.description: Get tp card (bug) content by specified id, e.g. 145789

tools.name: add_comment
tools.description: Adds provided content as a comment to the specified tp card by id, e.g. 145789

tools.name: get_user_story_comments
tools.description: Get comments for a TP user story by its ID

tools.name: get_bug_comments
tools.description: Get comments for a TP bug by its ID

tools.name: create_bug
tools.description:
Create a new bug card based on provided card id that summarizes the problem in concise,
      descriptive manner answering questions What? Where? When?,
      and content explaining what happened in detail.
      CRITICAL WORKFLOW: Before calling this tool, you MUST follow these steps: 
        1) IF you already have user story or bug card content, proceed to step 3 skipping step 2;
        2) ELSE call "get_user_story_content" tool or "get_bug_content" tool to get user story or bug card content

tools.name: create_test_plan
tools.description: Create a new test plan with provided title and user story id
